title: T2202 Tuition Enrolment Certificate - Canada.ca
content:
## T2202 Tuition and Enrolment Certificate
For detailed information on the amounts shown in the boxes of your T2202 certificate, see the corresponding box number below the following image:

## Box 11 – School Type
The one-digit indicator associated to your corresponding school type.
Other education institution providing courses at a post-secondary school level
Institution certified by the Minister of Employment and Social Development Canada
Flying school or club

## Box 12 - Flying school or club
The one-digit indicator associated to your corresponding flying school or club type, if you attended one.
Private pilot's licence
Commercial pilot's licence
Civil flying instructor rating
Helicopter category rating

## Box 13 - Name of program or course
The name of the program or course you were enrolled in at the designated educational institution.

## Box 14 - Student number
Your student number associated to the designated educational institution.
Your surname, first name, and initial.

## Box 17 - Social insurance number (SIN)
Your social insurance number.
Your full mailing address, including the province, territory, or U.S. state, Canadian postal code or U.S. zip code, and country.

## Box 19 - Start-date of the session (yy/mm)
The start date of the session, two-digit year and month, that you were enrolled in the designated educational institution.

## Box 20 - End-date of the session (yy/mm)
The end date of the session, two-digit year and month, that you were enrolled in the designated educational institution.

## Box 21 - Number of months part-time
The number of part-time months that you were enrolled in the designated educational institution.

## Box 22 - Number of months full-time
The number of full-time months that you were enrolled in the designated educational institution.

## Box 23 - Eligible tuition fees, part-time or full-time
The amount of eligible tuition fees for the part-time or full-time session.

## Box 24 - Total number of months part-time
The total number of part-time months that you were enrolled in the designated educational institution.

## Box 25 - Total number of months full-time
The total number of full-time months that you were enrolled in the designated educational institution.

## Box 26 - Total eligible tuition fees, part-time and full-time
Enter the total amount of eligible tuition fees for part-time and full-time sessions that the student was enrolled in a qualifying educational program or specified educational program.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
